## COMM-HUB-RELAY-RUNTIME-IMPLEMENT-F-HALT-SMOKE-CASE-12-DESIGN-SPEC — CLOSED at `a3a7e35ce2b64024de6939a0bdee498c91ae70cc`

COMM-HUB-RELAY-RUNTIME-IMPLEMENT-F-HALT-SMOKE-CASE-12-DESIGN-SPEC is a DOCS-ONLY (Mode 3) operator-directed codification phase persisting the Codex-approved conversation-only `COMM-HUB-RELAY-RUNTIME-IMPLEMENT-F-HALT-SMOKE-CASE-12-DESIGN` (Mode 2 / DESIGN-ONLY) as a permanent SAFE-class handoff record at `orchestrator/handoffs/COMM-HUB-RELAY-RUNTIME-IMPLEMENT-F-HALT-SMOKE-CASE-12-DESIGN.md`. The fix addresses the F-HALT-SMOKE-RUN-8 sole remaining skip — Case 12 `rate-limit halt fires with class 5 via adapter` — via a future 2-file Relay edit (1) to `src/verify/limits.js` aligning the gate-8 verifier with the canonical `{ maxPerWindow, windowMs }` object shape validated by `src/runtime/rate-limit-state.js`, and (2) to `tests/smoke/12-rate-limit-adapter-halt.test.js` reactivating the test as an AMENDMENT-7-style non-boot direct gate-verifier test. Root cause: `src/verify/limits.js:83` compares `current >= channelCap` where `channelCap` is the canonical object `{ maxPerWindow, windowMs }` (not a scalar); the number-vs-object comparison coerces to NaN and always returns false, so gate-8 never fires halt class 5. Proposed Option C: change `current >= channelCap.maxPerWindow`, emit `params: { channelCap: channelCap.maxPerWindow, currentCount: current }`, update stale line-44 comment to ASCII-only object-shape wording per CASE-09 SAFE IMPLEMENTATION ASCII-only precedent (no Unicode `§`), preserve `haltClassOverride: 5` and character-limit branch unchanged, reactivate Case 12 with direct `errors[0].haltClassOverride === 5` assertion (cleaner than AMENDMENT-7 keyword-mapping because limits gate's error envelope already includes haltClassOverride field). Codex DESIGN-ONLY review verdict on CASE-12-DESIGN: PASS WITH REQUIRED EDITS — 15 review goals all CONFIRMED; required edits limited to comment-wording compaction (applied in substance with ASCII-only `section` substituted for Unicode `§` per CASE-09 precedent) and test-construction string-quoting confirmation (already correct in design); Codex `params.channelCap` downstream cross-grep returned NONE FOUND in Relay `src/` confirming zero surprise-breakage risk. Rejected alternatives: Option A (implementation-only; leaves regression skip permanent), Option B (test-only; aligns with bug not canonical contract; `rate-limit-state.js:97-110` rejects scalar shape at boot), Option D (contract rollback; loses `windowMs` window semantics; touches sealed RUNTIME-DESIGN + E-VERIFY-DESIGN + rate-limit-state.js). Pre-DESIGN-SPEC parent anchor was RUN-8-CLOSEOUT at `9adc11d94fc993f36c8ca8dc404778a9fd0adb8d`. Expected post-CASE-12 RUN-9 smoke-run tally (if/when RUN-9 is approved): `13 total / 13 pass / 0 skip / 0 fail` — fully clean F-HALT-SMOKE suite; maximum-validation terminal end-state. ## COMM-HUB-RELAY-RUNTIME-IMPLEMENT-G-3-BOOT-JS-GATE-9-WIRING-DESIGN-SPEC — CLOSED at `29ea5a4b8c57d6864ae4f1be3025a06c3615dea8`

COMM-HUB-RELAY-RUNTIME-IMPLEMENT-G-3-BOOT-JS-GATE-9-WIRING-DESIGN-SPEC is a DOCS-ONLY (Mode 3) operator-directed codification phase persisting the Codex-approved conversation-only `COMM-HUB-RELAY-RUNTIME-IMPLEMENT-G-3-BOOT-JS-GATE-9-WIRING-DESIGN` (Mode 2 / DESIGN-ONLY) as a permanent SAFE-class handoff record at `orchestrator/handoffs/COMM-HUB-RELAY-RUNTIME-IMPLEMENT-G-3-BOOT-JS-GATE-9-WIRING-DESIGN.md`. **G-3 is the highest-risk Phase G subphase** per the sealed G-READINESS-DESIGN-SPEC at parent `95da6ef…` because it touches sealed `src/runtime/boot.js` Stage 12/13/15 wiring + AMENDMENT-3/5/6/7 invariants. G-3 design wires the G-2 sealed gateway modules at Relay `2765a97…` into `boot.js` Stage 15 default-wiring + existing gate-9 verifier flow without activating Discord, sending messages, touching tokens, or performing network actions. Path A selected (additive Stage 15 extension; Path B rejected because rateLimitState is created inside boot.js Stage 13 and external caller construction would duplicate rateLimitState or refactor boot.js). Codex DESIGN-ONLY review chain CLEARED: round-1 PASS WITH REQUIRED EDITS — 3 corrections applied conversation-only in this codification (Correction 1 reassignment-back specification ensuring default-wiring assigns constructed refs back into the 3 phaseG* parameter variables BEFORE the existing production validation runs so validation reads populated resolved refs not stale missing parameter values — bug-prevention is a load-bearing invariant of the G-3 design; Correction 2 atomic three-ref construction ensuring all 3 Phase G refs `phaseGSendAndRecord` + `phaseGAllowlistHook` + `phaseGEgressEventLog` are constructed together inside a single try block with shared allowlistHook + egressEventLog instances and on any throw NONE of the 3 refs are treated as installed via fail-closed Stage 15 halt path `postLoggerBootHalt(NETWORK_HOOK_MISSING_OR_INTEGRITY, 'phase-g-wiring-failed')`; Correction 3 Option A operator-selected allowlist source extending `runtimeConfig` contract with `allowlistedDiscordHostnames: string[]` read at default-wiring as `runtimeConfig?.allowlistedDiscordHostnames ?? []` consistent with sealed Phase F design §7 firm rule "no raw process.env reads" with empty/absent allowlist remaining fail-closed since G-3 wires `createSendMessage({ validateOnly: true })` so no real egress occurs and a 1-line module-header `runtimeConfig` field documentation addition to `boot.js` is the only non-Stage-15 boot.js change in G-3) + round-2 narrow re-review PASS — 13/13 goals confirmed; no remaining required edits; codification gate explicitly CLEARED. G-3 future implementation file scope (Codex-confirmed) is exactly 2 Relay-repo files: 1) `src/runtime/boot.js` (EDIT — additive Stage 15 extension only; new gateway imports at top of file allowed; new default-wiring block placed BEFORE existing production validation at lines 544-562 which remains byte-identical and now reads the populated resolved refs; existing gate-9 rebind block at lines 580-599 byte-identical; existing dry-run branches at lines 563-571 + 572-578 byte-identical; Stages 1-14 byte-identical; Stage 16 byte-identical; 1-line module-header runtimeConfig field documentation addition for `allowlistedDiscordHostnames`; AMENDMENT-3 `sealPending()` 0o555 at `temp-tree.js:23-31` untouched + AMENDMENT-5 polyfill at `schema-validator.js:119-126` untouched + AMENDMENT-6 object-map guard at `boot.js:360-371` byte-identical + AMENDMENT-7 4-file non-boot rewrite pattern at `tests/smoke/04-08-11.test.js` untouched + CASE-09 top-level REDACT_PATHS literals at `log.js:26-38` untouched + CASE-12 rate-limit canonical-shape check at `limits.js:80-84` untouched + SCAFFOLD-REPAIR Path D Cases 7+8 untouched + Phase D DP-5 `MESSAGE_STORE_PATH` validation untouched + halt.js RE-4 untouched + sealed `rate-limit-state.js` canonical contract untouched + Stage 12 wiring at `boot.js:308-371` byte-identical + Stage 13 `createRateLimitState` at `boot.js:448-475` byte-identical) + 2) `tests/smoke/14-boot-gate-9-wiring.test.js` (NEW — mocked side-effect-free boot wiring test wrapping in sealed `tests/smoke/helpers/network-observer.js` `observeNoNetwork()` lifecycle; asserts boot reaches Stage 15 default-wiring production-branch under `phaseGStubMode='disabled'` + mocked rateLimitState + no real network reach). G-3 construction set: `createDiscordClient()` (Layer 1 side-effect-free factory; no `.login()`; no gateway IDENTIFY; no HTTP/DNS/socket at module load or factory invocation; no process.env token read at module load) + `createSendMessage({ client, validateOnly: true })` (Layer 2 wrapper-construction-only with explicit factory-time guard; no real Discord token; no gateway connect; no outbound send) + `createEgressAllowlistHook({ allowlistedHostnames: runtimeConfig?.allowlistedDiscordHostnames ?? [] })` (Layer 3 inert-until-installed hook factory returning frozen `{ allowlistedHostnames, invoke }` matching sealed `src/verify/network-anomaly.js` verifier `EXPECTED_HOOK_SHAPE_KEYS`) + `createEgressEventLog({ maxSize: 1000 })` (Layer 4 bounded Array-compatible ring buffer with default maxSize 1000; `Array.isArray(log) === true` for verifier compatibility) + `createPhaseGSendAndRecord({ sendMessage, egressEventLog, rateLimitState, allowlistHook })` (orchestration callable factory with closure-captured dependencies per Codex Correction 2 from G-2 review; composition order `sendMessage` -> `pushBounded(egressEventLog, ...)` -> construct canonical Phase D success record -> `publishLog.append(successRecord)` per Codex Correction 1 from G-2 review -> `rateLimitState.incrementOnPublish({channelName})` -> `store.moveToProcessed(filename)`). rateLimitState captured from Stage 13 local variable via closure; no duplicate rateLimitState creation; sealed `src/runtime/run-pipeline.js` untouched and receives only the resulting phaseGSendAndRecord callable per its existing per-invocation signature `async ({ message, pipelineState, publishLog, store, filename, safeLog, hermesVersion }) => Result`. Default-wiring fires only for `relayMode === 'production'` when any of the 3 Phase G refs is missing (typeof `phaseGSendAndRecord !== 'function' || !phaseGAllowlistHook || !phaseGEgressEventLog`); dry-run + `phaseGStubMode='stub-empty-allowlist'` (sealed lines 563-571) byte-identical; dry-run + `phaseGStubMode='disabled'` (sealed lines 572-578) byte-identical and keeps existing null-ref gate-9 halt class 32 behavior. `src/verify/network-anomaly.js` (canonical Phase E gate-9 verifier; consumes hookRef + logRef provided by G-2 modules via G-3 wiring) untouched.
